things.name: Arenal Volcano & Hot Springs
things.description: Perfect cone volcano with lava flows and jungle hot springs 3 hours from San Jose

things.name: Monteverde Cloud Forest
things.description: Quetzals, jaguars and hanging bridges through the cloud forest canopy

things.name: Manuel Antonio National Park
things.description: Jungle trails to white-sand Pacific beaches with white-faced capuchin monkeys

things.name: National Theatre (Teatro Nacional)
things.description: 1897 neoclassical theatre - the finest building in Central America

things.name: Mercado Central San Jose
things.description: Chaotic covered market with Costa Rican food stalls, coffee, spices and crafts

things.name: Tortuguero National Park
things.description: Venice of Costa Rica - canal boat to the nesting beach of the green sea turtle

things.name: Gold Museum (Museo del Oro)
things.description: Pre-Columbian gold artefacts of Costa Rica's indigenous people

things.name: Poas Volcano National Park
things.description: Drive-up active volcano with one of the world's largest volcanic craters

things.name: Sloth Sanctuary
things.description: Rescue sanctuary for three-toed and two-toed sloths on the Caribbean coast

things.name: Cafe Britt Coffee Tour
things.description: Costa Rica's most famous coffee with a theatrical tour of the growing and roasting
